recommendations.title: Close
recommendations.overview: Two 13-year-old boys spend an idyllic summer together, but their connection is put to the test when they become the subject of speculation at school.

recommendations.title: Beautiful Thing
recommendations.overview: During a long, hot summer on the Thamesmead Estate in Southeast London, three teenagers edge towards adulthood.

recommendations.title: Nothing in Return
recommendations.overview: One summer, Dario flees the hellish environment of his home. Luismi, unconditional friend, a poor devil with pretensions of winning, and Antonia, an old woman who collects abandoned his motorcar furniture, become his new family. Three generations liv

recommendations.title: Peppermint Soda
recommendations.overview: In the fall of 1963, Anne is becoming a teenager. She lives in Paris with her mother and her older sister, Frédérique. They're just back from summer at the beach with their father. School starts. A turbulent year awaits them both.

recommendations.title: Holy Camp!
recommendations.overview: María and Susana, two rebellious teenagers, spend the summer in a catholic camp. While they are grounded during a weekend, the most unexpected arrival in the most unexpected way will change their feelings about life, love and freedom.

recommendations.title: Eulogy
recommendations.overview: A black comedy that follows three generations of a family, who come together for the funeral of the patriarch - unveiling a litany of family secrets and covert relationships.

recommendations.title: Junkyard Dog
recommendations.overview: Childhood pals Dog and Mirales live in a little village in the south of France and spend their days just hanging out. To kill time, Mirales has got into the habit of teasing Dog mercilessly. But this summer is different: Dog meets Elsa and romance bl

recommendations.title: The Misfits Club
recommendations.overview: Valeria has just moved to Madrid after her parent's separation. What at first seems a bad start for her new life becomes the beginning of an amazing life experience. New friendships, a city full of possibilities, first love...

recommendations.title: The Runaways
recommendations.overview: Joan Jett and Cherie Currie, two rebellious teenagers from Southern California, become the frontwomen for The Runaways -- the now-legendary group that paved the way for future generations of female rockers. Under the Svengali-like influence of impres

recommendations.title: Staten Island Summer
recommendations.overview: Pals Danny and Frank spend the summer after high school working as lifeguards while figuring out their future.
